final_prompt.prompt:
Create a professional documentary-style banner image for Weibo news/hot-topic feature, in the quiet tension between urban rush and golden-hour stillness.

Style/medium: documentary editorial photography with the candid immediacy of a phone-captured moment elevated to reportage, designed for social news feed impact
Composition: panoramic 16:9 horizontal sweep, generous left-to-right breathing room for headline overlay, subject anchored in the lower visual weight
Subject: city skyline at dusk with pedestrians in motion blur, distant skyscrapers catching the last amber light, neon signs beginning their evening hum
Scene/backdrop: urban street level looking toward high-rise cluster, the transition hour between day and night when artificial and natural light negotiate
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro between warm sunset reflection on glass towers and cool neon awakening below, the emotional weight of a day ending
Color palette: amber gold bleeding into electric blue, the chromatic tension of urban dusk
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
  大标题：“城市里的安静时刻”
  副文：“黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙”
  水印：“@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察”
Constraints: 16:9 aspect ratio, horizontal banner format, ample negative space for text overlay, all three text elements clearly positioned for readability
Avoid: oversaturated HDR look, generic stock cityscape, soft dreamlike blur that loses the documentary edge, 8K stuffer language
